objective: A clean flat-screen OpenMW build in which a player can naturally start, finish, save, reload, and replay Fallout: New Vegas plus every official DLC with retail-equivalent game state, behavior, presentation, audio, timing, and persistence.

scorePolicy.axisScoreFormula: min(completeCapabilityCases/totalCapabilityCases, minimum(accepted/total for each required content-instance family))
scorePolicy.completeCapabilityRule: A capability case is complete only after its exit criterion passes discovery, exact format/retail contract, runtime binding, native behavior, mutation, lifecycle/save-load where applicable, retail differential, promoted-binary provenance, and regressions.
scorePolicy.partialCreditRule: No partial maturity state earns certified parity credit. It remains visible only as engineering progress.
scorePolicy.failureRule: Unknown, unvisited, unsupported, fallback, warning, forced proof state, synthetic stage change, missing evidence, or unpromoted code counts as not complete.
scorePolicy.releaseRule: Parity ready is true only when every axis is exactly 100%, every generated content row is pass, the natural journey matrix is green, and there are zero unexplained warnings/fallbacks.
scorePolicy.capabilityInventoryRule: The 187 checked-in cases are a minimum macro taxonomy, not a claim of exhaustive discovery. Newly discovered retail responsibilities enter the denominator immediately. A case may be removed only through a versioned, user-approved exclusion row.
scorePolicy.counterPromotionRule: An accepted content numerator above zero must be derived from an immutable generated result ledger; hand-edited accepted counters are invalid.

engineeringProgress.warning: Engineering progress is diagnostic only. It proves substantial working implementation but never substitutes for certified retail parity.

currentTruth.formalControlsWarning: The 25% figure includes FO3 control, Morrowind regression, and patch replay. It is infrastructure health and must never be reported as FNV parity.
currentTruth.wholeCorpusRuntimeCoverage: bounded observations are reported per family; every required family has 0 accepted rows

onionLayers.name: Freeze truth
onionLayers.exit: Pristine retail profile, committed master/archive hashes, master-aware winning-record census, asset graph, zero unexplained parse rows, and a reproducible score report.
onionLayers.hardStop: No feature percentage is certifiable while the corpus or denominator is mutable.

onionLayers.name: Runtime substrate
onionLayers.exit: The general native FNV state, identity, persistence, event-scheduler, command-registry, condition-registry, and GECK-bytecode architecture exists; the exact subset required by the first natural spine is implemented without record-specific substitutions; every still-unknown record/opcode/state family is generated into a red ledger row.
onionLayers.hardStop: Do not build the spine on synthetic SetStage, ESM3 player substitution, record-specific Lua, or state that disappears on reload; do not postpone architecture validation until every opcode is implemented.

onionLayers.name: Natural playable spine
onionLayers.exit: Retail intro through Doc Mitchell character creation, Goodsprings tutorial, HUD/Pip-Boy, inventory, combat, dialogue, quest advancement, manual save, quit, reload, and continuation pass without harness-driven state changes.
onionLayers.hardStop: A driven subsystem circuit or screenshot cannot substitute for natural play.

onionLayers.name: Mechanic equivalence classes
onionLayers.exit: Every stored/runtime record family, GECK opcode/event/command/condition, activation, inventory, weapon, damage, AI package, dialogue, quest, UI, audio, render, and persistence variant has an exact handler plus boundary tests and at least one retail differential.
onionLayers.hardStop: No actor-, quest-, cell-, or FormID-specific gameplay hacks.

onionLayers.name: Whole-corpus crawl
onionLayers.exit: Every one of 628,395 winning live records, 427,319 live placements, 181,642 unique VFS paths, and every generated feature row is classified and has a deterministic result.
onionLayers.hardStop: Unseen, unknown, fallback, and warning rows are failures, not exclusions.

onionLayers.name: Natural campaigns and DLCs
onionLayers.exit: All base-game factions/endings, every official quest, companion arc, minigame, and all four story DLCs plus GRA/preorder content complete from clean saves with retail state and endings.
onionLayers.hardStop: Forced quest stages earn diagnostic evidence only.

onionLayers.name: Differential, lifecycle, and soak
onionLayers.exit: Retail/OpenMW state, pixels, audio, timing, cell unload/reload, interruption, save/load, performance, and long-soak matrices pass on one promoted binary with clean controls.
onionLayers.hardStop: Nonblack screenshots, clean exits, or focused unit tests alone are insufficient.

onionLayers.name: Release and enhancement lane
onionLayers.exit: Clean-machine install is reproducible; release manifest is immutable; optional graphics mods pass the same regression suite without contributing retail-parity credit.
onionLayers.hardStop: Mods cannot mask or score around a retail-engine failure.

cases.exit: Ten official master sizes, hashes, order, overrides, and deletes reproduce from committed tooling.
Twenty-one archive hashes and all winning VFS entries reproduce with zero unexplained duplicates.
Parity profile loads only official masters/archives and isolated writable state, passes strict corpus verification, and has a committed immutable profile hash.

Native level-one session uses no dry start, forced weather/image-space, actor neutralization, foreground input, or implicit equipment, and the accepted result carries a normal exit plus immutable promoted binary, corpus, profile, save, and evidence hashes.
Oracle build, game version, corpus, save, camera, time, weather, and capture contract are immutable for every differential.
Every local engine commit is exported, replayed from the locked base, rebuilt, and tree-identical.
Shared FO3 paths and Morrowind controls pass every promoted FNV slice on the same binary.
Runtime and crawl contain zero unexplained ESM3 fallbacks, unhandled controllers/stages, missing resources, or compatibility defaults.
All 629,798 physical headers and override chains parse with exact byte consumption.
Every master-relative FormID resolves through the frozen load order; the one malformed GRA REFR is explicitly classified.
Committed tooling reproduces 628,395 official winning live records and 68 winning deletes.
Every FNV record family is stored or explicitly proven irrelevant; current store coverage is 61 of 140 cross-game enums.
Every observed subrecord/flag/version variant has exact parser tests and no ignored gameplay-bearing bytes.
All 427,319 live placements resolve to a winning base or an explicit engine-reserved special form.
All 5,151 physical and 5,148 winning-live SCRI attachment records, plus quest/dialogue result scripts, resolve to executable contracts.
Every record-to-asset edge resolves to a winning VFS path and decode/runtime result.
No winning live record required by retail play is skipped, generic-no-op, or parser-only.

axes.name: World traversal, streaming, physics, navigation, and doors

cases.exit: All worldspace inheritance, climate, water, map, and transition fields match retail.
Every exterior loads, crosses boundaries, pages LOD, and returns without missing scenery or state loss.
Every interior loads actors, references, lighting, audio, nav, and scripts without fallback.
All 1,378 directed XTEL transitions and 485 cell pairs work in both directions with retail placement/timing.
Locked, keyed, owned, trapped, crime, and persistence variants match retail.
Player, actors, projectiles, doors, statics, terrain, water, and triggers collide with retail dimensions and stepping.
NAVM/NAVI and doors/path portals drive retail-equivalent paths instead of generated-only navigation.
Actors follow authored packages across exterior cells and doors without teleports or stalls.
Every XESP chain, quest enable state, disable/delete, unload/reload, and save/load transition is exact.
Game time, timescale, wait, sleep, trespass, rest restrictions, schedules, and needs advance exactly.
All 320 markers, discovery state, local/global map, restrictions, travel time, encounters, and persistence work naturally.
Terrain/object/tree/actor LOD and occlusion match across all cells, distances, times, and reloads.

WATR/PWAT surfaces, depth, reflection, refraction, fog, current, sound, collision, and underwater state match retail.
All climates/weather/times render retail-equivalent atmosphere, four authored cloud layers, sun, moons, stars, transitions, and lifecycle.
All 98 WTHR records and transitions reproduce colors, near/far/power curves, wind, sounds, and lifecycle.
Rain, snow, ash, lightning, thunder, ripples, wind, occlusion, and transitions match retail.
Exterior/interior lighting templates, local lights, shadows, ambient, sun, emissive, and exposure match retail pixels.
Every shader/material flag handles alpha, windows, signs, reflection, glow, skin, decals, and depth without bleed or black planes.
IMGS/IMAD, HDR adaptation, bloom, tint, blur, DOF, fade, cinematic effects, and ordering match shader-byte and pixel oracles.
Muzzle flashes, tracers, impacts, blood, dust, smoke, fire, explosions, decals, and lifetime/order match retail.
Every race/sex/head/body/hair/beard/eyes/teeth/hands/outfit/skin configuration renders and animates correctly.
Every creature skeleton, skin, attachment, animation, effect, LOD, death, and gore variant is accepted.
Every item/weapon model, holster, grip, magazine, projectile helper, icon, world/drop state, and LOD matches retail.
All KF/controller/interpolator/blend/root-motion/priorities and lifecycle states match representative retail traces and every outlier.
Same-state native retail/OpenMW frames pass explicit masks, transforms, color, material, silhouette, and temporal tolerances; nonblack statistics are not evidence.
